content: getuid  Table of contents Prototype: getuid(username) Return type: int Description: Return the integer user id of the named user on this host If the named user is not registered the variable will not be defined. Arguments: username : string - User name in text - in the range: .* Example: code body common control { bundlesequence => { "example" }; } bundle agent example { vars : " uid " int => getuid ( "root" ); reports : "root's uid is $(uid) " ; } Output: code R: root's uid is 0 Notes: On Windows, which does not support user ids, the variable will not be defined.
title: getuid
